name: micro-agent-protocol
description: Micro Agent Protocol (MAP) - Open standard for AI assistant to micro-agent delegation

scripts.verify:reference: npm run check && npm run build && npm test
scripts.conformance:all: npm run conformance:reference && npm run conformance:profiles && npm run conformance:trust && npm run conformance:fixtures && npm run conformance:errors && npm run conformance:contract && npm run conformance:api-surface
scripts.sdk:typescript: cd packages/typescript && npm run check && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.protocols:clone: cd references/protocols && git clone https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/specification.git mcp || true && git clone https://github.com/google/A2A.git a2a || true
